products.name: CRE2-MUAV
products.descriptor: Compact lightweight phased-array radio transceiver for small unmanned systems

evidence.snippet:
### CRE2-MUAV
![Radionor CRE2-MUAV tactical broadband unit](https://radionor.no/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/cre2-muav.png)
Compact and lightweight radio transceiver designed for integration into small unmanned systems.

products.name: CRE2-MUAV-NAV
products.descriptor: CRE2-MUAV extended with high-precision geolocation navigation module

evidence.snippet:
### CRE2-MUAV-NAV
![Radionor CRE2-MUAV-NAV tactical broadband unit](https://radionor.no/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/cre2-muav-nav.png)
Extended with a module that gives high precision geolocation navigation in addition to the tactical long range wireless communication system.

products.name: CRE2-SUAV-NAV
products.descriptor: Combat-proven tactical broadband radio with integrated high-precision navigation for small UAVs

evidence.snippet:
### CRE2-SUAV-NAV
![Radionor CRE2-SUAV-NAV tactical broadband unit](https://radionor.no/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/suav.png)
CRE2-SUAV-NAV is a combat proven tactical long range wireless communications sys-tem extended with a high precision geolocation navigation system.

products.name: CRE2-TUAV
products.descriptor: Horizontally mounted phased-array radio panel for UAV applications

evidence.snippet:
### CRE2-TUAV
![Radionor CRE2-TUAV tactical broadband unit](https://radionor.no/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/cre2-tuav-ren.png)
Horizontally mounted panel with radio transceiver and antennas ideal for UAV applications.

products.name: MICRO
products.descriptor: Lightweight electronically steered phased-array radio with omni antenna and heat sink kit

evidence.snippet:
### MICRO
![Radionor CRE2-MICRO tactical broadband unit](https://radionor.no/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/kit2.png)
The MICRO is a lightweight, electronically steered phased-array radio. Mounted on kit with omni-ant and heat sink.

products.name: REDBOX™
products.descriptor: High-precision geolocation navigation accessory for CRE2 tactical radio systems

evidence.snippet:
![Radionor REDBOX, a CRE2 accessory for geolocation](https://radionor.no/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/hovedbilde.png)
Accessory that gives high precision geolocation navigation in addition to the tactical long range wireless communication system.
Explore product

products.name: CRE2-COMPACT
